hypothesis: If universal machine-learning interatomic potentials (including equivariant GNNs and graph transformers) are applied to a diverse set of MOFs and nanoporous materials with appropriate dispersion corrections, then they will reproduce DFT-calculated optimized structures, NpT MD stability, bulk moduli, and heat capacities to within DFT-level accuracy because their training on diverse datasets captures the relevant interatomic interactions governing these properties.
